system.description:
*magical*

A length of bluish-white lamé, maybe 6 inches wide by 6 feet long, snaking about in the air. Like a belt, but for someone far larger than you.

When you **_wrap the sash securely around_** **_your waist_**, it buoys you against falls—you never fall faster than if you had fallen your own height.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.3UhyCbr1XGkhX6SO]{Tempest Lords}.*
